About Me

The Designer
Behind the Brand

I'm Zaryab Malik, a packaging and graphic designer based in Lahore, Pakistan. I help brands build shelf presence, convert on Amazon, and look unforgettable — whether in retail stores or online marketplaces.

My work spans box packaging, flexible pouches, Amazon A+ content, logo design, and photorealistic 3D mockups. I work with brands worldwide through Fiverr and direct freelance — delivering print-ready files with precision every time.

Adobe Illustrator Photoshop InDesign Blender 3D Canva Pro Dieline Specialist Print-Ready Files 3D Mockups

What I Offer

My Services

01
Box & Retail Packaging
Custom box packaging with dieline, print-ready files, and 3D photorealistic mockups. Perfect for retail, e-commerce, and Amazon sellers.
→
02
Amazon Label & Banner Design
Product labels, infographic banners, and A+ content that make your Amazon listing stand out and convert at a higher rate.
→
03
Pouch & Bag Design
Stand-up pouch, flat pouch, and flexible packaging design for food, supplements, cosmetics, and more — all print-ready.
→
04
Logo & Brand Identity
Memorable logo design and cohesive brand identity systems — colors, typography, and visual language that tell your story.
→
05
3D Mockup Rendering
Photorealistic 3D mockups of your packaging, perfect for marketing materials, investor decks, and product launches.
→
06
Social Media Graphics
On-brand post designs, banners, and promotional graphics that keep your social media looking professional and consistent.
→
How It Works

My Design Process

01
Discovery
We talk about your brand, audience, goals, and competitors. I ask the right questions to understand what success looks like.
02
Concept
I sketch directions and present initial concepts for your review — focused on strategy, not just aesthetics.
03
Refinement
We iterate until it's perfect. Every revision is purposeful. I don't stop until you're genuinely thrilled.
04
Delivery
Print-ready files, source files, mockups — organized, labeled, and ready to send to the printer the same day.
